name: Bean Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 pound beef stew meat, cut into 1-inch cubes
1/2 pound Brussels sprouts, fresh or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Add beans to boiling water in a 3-quart saucepan or Dutch oven; boil for two minutes.
2. Remove from heat and let stand covered for one hour.
3. Brown meat in hot oil.
4. Add onion and cook until brown.
5. Add meat and onion mixture and all other ingredients (except Brussels sprouts) to the beans.
6. Add one cup boiling water.
7. Simmer stew for 1 hour, then add sprouts and cook for an additional 15 minutes.
